name: Network  Mining and Analysis
description: Complex network structures are ubiquitous: the world-wide web, the internet, mobile phone networks, social communities, network structures inbiology are just a few popular examples. The module shows how simple combinatorial and algorithmic techniques can be exploited to obtain useful informationabout these (often) massive structures. The content is delivered through a mixture of lectures on core topics and more informal presentations onvarious application areas. A series of interactive tutorials and on-line tools in VITAL complete the support offered by this module.
